div.div:
Constraints
• iOS deployment target: 15.5 (required by google_mlkit_commons)
• ML Kit text recognition is not available on desktop — macOS uses Vision via method channel; Windows / Linux use Tesseract
• camera_desktop image streaming is unavailable on Windows — uses periodic still-frame capture instead
• flutter_zxing is native FFI — barcode decoding cannot be unit-tested; covered by integration tests

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
